summary.en: A specification for shaping error codes into a stable contract that is easier to govern, observe, and consume across teams.
summary.zh: 以 HTTP、gRPC 与 OpenTelemetry 为主标准，统一定义基础错误码、业务异常扩展方式、错误响应载体与观测映射规则。

readingDirection.en: Read this when trying to make service errors more structured, machine-readable, and operationally useful.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在设计 API 错误模型、跨协议错误响应、业务异常扩展与可观测错误聚合时优先阅读。
